title: jade's plushies
description: plushies of ocs that go squeak squish
body:
jade's plushies

Adds a few plushies of OCs from me and my friends. You can right click to squish them. ![](https://git.oat.zone/oat/jades-plushies/media/branch/main/docs/showcase.gif) --- Current plushies included are: - [Jillo](https://oat.zone/#characters/jillo.chr) (by me) - [She](https://oat.zone/#characters/she.chr) (by me) - [Lez](https://ryzzica.xyz/oc/lez/) (by Rya) You can craft them by putting a block of wool (any color) into a stonecutter. ![](https://git.oat.zone/oat/jades-plushies/media/branch/main/docs/recipes.png) squeak squish
